page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.8xlarge is a storage and memory-optimized server instance designed for data-intensive workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor with an x86_64 architecture, this instance features 32 dedicated physical cores running at 2.5 GHz with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes a substantial 7679 GB of local SSD storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as evidenced by bottom-quartile results in stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core tests, alongside poor single-threaded gzip compression. However, the instance demonstrates solid multi-threaded efficiency. Multi-core CPU benchmarks, including Geekbench multi-core, Passmark CPU, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, consistently fall within the average range. Memory bandwidth tests for both small and large blocks also show average performance, though the Passmark memory score is positioned in the lower 25%.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.i2ne.8xlarge offers high resource density by bundling a very large local SSD storage capacity with a balanced allocation of dedicated CPU cores and memory. This makes it a viable option for workloads that require high-capacity local storage without needing top-tier single-threaded compute performance.

This instance is well-suited for database operations, multi-threaded data processing, static web serving, and Redis deployments. The combination of 32 dedicated cores and 7679 GB of local SSD storage supports high-throughput storage-bound applications and medium-scale database hosting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.8xlarge is a storage-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 cores running at 2.5 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM and a massive 7679 GB of local SSD storage, alongside a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data reveals weak single-core performance but average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities, making it highly effective for parallelized tasks. Qualitatively, the instance provides strong cost efficiency for storage-heavy deployments by bundling massive local SSD capacity with dedicated compute resources. It is best suited for databases, Redis deployments, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.8xlarge is a storage-optimized server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 7679 GB of local SSD storage, built for database and multi-threaded workloads.

tagline: A storage-dense virtual server featuring dedicated cores and massive local SSD capacity for data-intensive and database workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
7679 GB of bundled local SSD storage for high-capacity data needs
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for reliable data transfer
Optimized for databases, Redis, and multi-threaded processing
